title: Fused GPG policy loss Triton kernel
summary: Fused GPG policy loss helper that avoids materializing the intermediate token-loss tensor.

representative_shapes: gpg loss on representative PPO batches

success_gate: Preserve GPG loss semantics and only use the fused path when it avoids the intermediate loss materialization safely.

results.note: Fuses -log_prob * advantages + agg_loss into single kernel. No intermediate (B,T) tensor. Supports all 4 aggregation modes.

notes: Normalized from the legacy task-card schema on 2026-04-03 to restore queue validation.
